title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates a multi-agent system architecture where 1000 agents perform deterministic route planning without invoking the LLM, using a before_model_callback pattern to skip model inference when rules-based logic is more appropriate. The system uses the Spine & Sprout algorithm for NP-hard route optimization rather than delegating to an LLM, reducing token costs and latency while maintaining agent abstraction.
